tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "C2_Attacker"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "TCP_8443"
set tcp-portrange 8443
next
end

config firewall ssl-ssh-profile
edit "deep-inspect-egress"
config https
set inspection-mode deep
end
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_C2_HTTPS_8443"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "C2_Attacker"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "TCP_8443"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "Allow_Egress_With_SSL_Inspection"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set ssl-ssh-profile "deep-inspect-egress"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall ssl-ssh-profile
config firewall ssl-ssh-profile
    edit "deep-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only deep inspection profile."
        config https
            set ports 443
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config ftps
            set ports 990
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config imaps
            set ports 993
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config pop3s
            set ports 995
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config smtps
            set ports 465
            set status deep-inspection
        end
        config ssh
set ports 22
            set status disable
        end
        config dot
            set status disable
        end
        config ssl-exempt
            edit 1
                set fortiguard-category 31
            next
            edit 2
                set fortiguard-category 33
            next
            edit 3
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "adobe"
            next
            edit 4
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "Adobe Login"
            next
            edit 5
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "android"
next
            edit 6
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "apple"
            next
            edit 7

            next

            next

            next

next

            next

            next

            next

            next

next

            next
            edit 32

                set wildcard-fqdn "mzstatic-apple"
            next
        end
    next
    edit "custom-deep-inspection"
        set comment "Customizable deep inspection profile."
        config https
            set ports 443

        config ftps
            set ports 990
            set status deep-inspection
end
        config imaps
            set ports 993

            next
            edit 21
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "microsoft"
            next
            edit 22
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "skype"
            next
            edit 23
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "softwareupdate.vmware.com"
            next
            edit 24
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "verisign"
            next
            edit 25
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "Windows update 2"
            next
            edit 26
set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "live.com"
            next
            edit 27
                set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "google-play"
            next
            edit 28

            next
            edit 31
                set type wildcard-fqdn

            next
            edit 32
set type wildcard-fqdn
                set wildcard-fqdn "mzstatic-apple"
            next
        end
    next
    edit "no-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only profile that does no inspection."
        config https
            set status disable
        end
        config ftps
            set status disable
        end
        config imaps
            set status disable
        end
        config pop3s
            set status disable
        end
        config smtps
            set status disable
        end
        config ssh
            set ports 22
set status disable
        end
        config dot
            set status disable
        end
    next
    edit "certificate-inspection"
        set comment "Read-only SSL handshake inspection profile."
        config https
            set ports 443
            set status certificate-inspection
        end
        config ftps
            set status disable
        end
        config imaps
            set status disable
        end
        config pop3s
            set status disable
        end
        config smtps
            set status disable
        end
config ssh
            set ports 22
            set status disable
        end
        config dot
            set status disable
        end
    next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Deny_C2_HTTPS_8443"
        set uuid d4653364-291c-51f1-4e68-2508b12a5ab4
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "C2_Attacker"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "TCP_8443"
        set logtraffic all
    next
edit 3
        set name "Allow_Egress_With_SSL_Inspection"
        set uuid d479fe2a-291c-51f1-b060-a503199dba31
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set nat enable
    next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 3
set ssl-ssh-profile "custom-deep-inspection"
set comments "Apply deep inspection for egress and DLP enforcement"
next
end

config firewall policy
delete 1
end

show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) # set ssl-ssh-profile "custom-deep-inspection"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) # set comments "Apply deep inspection for egress and DLP  enforcement"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Deny_C2_HTTPS_8443"
        set uuid d4653364-291c-51f1-4e68-2508b12a5ab4
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "C2_Attacker"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "TCP_8443"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 3
        set name "Allow_Egress_With_SSL_Inspection"
        set uuid d479fe2a-291c-51f1-b060-a503199dba31
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set ssl-ssh-profile "custom-deep-inspection"
        set logtraffic all
set nat enable
        set comments "Apply deep inspection for egress and DLP enforcement"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config dlp filter
edit "Block_TarGz_Uploads"
set comment "Detect and block .tar.gz uploads via multipart/form-data or content-type application/x-compressed"
config packet-length
set min 1024
set max 10485760
end
config extended
edit 1
set name "Detect_TarGz"
set pattern "\.tar\.gz"
set pattern-type wildcard
set protocol http
set action block
next
end
next
end

config dlp sensor
edit "Egress_DLP_Sensor"
set comment "Apply upload blocking rules"
config filter
edit 1
set filter "Block_TarGz_Uploads"
next
end
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 3
set ips-sensor "Egress_DLP_Sensor"
next
end

show dlp filter
show dlp sensor
show firewall policy"}
